scope.purpose: Define the specification for a valid merge proof — the terminal record of a governed merge event that binds the complete approval lineage chain and enables future audit and replay detection.

proof_id.description: Unique identifier for this merge proof

proof_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonicalized proof object (excluding this field)

invocation_nonce.description: Single-use nonce bound to this proof generation event; reuse produces NULL

pr_number.description: GitHub PR number that was merged

base_branch.description: Target branch into which the PR was merged (must be main for governed merges)

head_branch.description: Source branch from which the PR was created

head_sha.description: The exact commit SHA of the PR head at the time PREO was generated and checks ran — the reviewed object

merge_commit_sha.description: The exact commit SHA that entered the base branch — the merged object. For squash/rebase merges, this differs from head_sha.

merge_method.description: The merge method used — determines relationship between head_sha and merge_commit_sha

review_status.description: Approval state of the PR at merge time — must be APPROVED for merge legitimacy

reviewer_identity.description: GitHub login of the approving reviewer

review_submitted_at.description: Timestamp of the approving review submission

stale_review_dismissed.description: Whether stale review dismissal was active when the PR was merged — must be true for governed merges

preo_id.description: Identifier of the PREO_CANDIDATE that covers this merge

preo_head_sha.description: The head_sha bound in the PREO_CANDIDATE — must match head_sha in this proof

preo_status.description: Status of the PREO at merge time — must be PREO_CANDIDATE or PREO_VALID; PREO_INVALID produces NULL

preo_risk_class.description: Risk classification assigned by the PREO_CANDIDATE

sco_id.description: Identifier of the SCO_CANDIDATE — required when governed_path_detected is true

sco_head_sha.description: The head_sha bound in the SCO_CANDIDATE — must match head_sha in this proof

governed_path_detected.description: Whether the PR touched governed paths requiring SCO

mutation_classes.description: List of mutation classes detected by the SCO (e.g., governance_mutation, runtime_mutation, workflow_mutation)

checks_status.description: Status of all required status checks at merge time — must be PASSING

required_checks_passed.description: List of required check names that passed (merge-governance-check, generate-preo-candidate, generate-sco-candidate)

topology_reconciliation_id.description: Identifier of the TOPOLOGY_RECONCILIATION_SIGNAL emitted during this merge check run

topology_merge_signal.description: Topology reconciliation signal — must be SAFE_TO_MERGE; other values produce MERGE_LEGITIMACY_NULL

topology_evidence_only.description: Must be true — topology reconciliation signal is evidence only and cannot authorize merge

merged_by.description: GitHub login of the actor who performed the merge

merge_actor_classification.description: Classification of the merge actor — admin_override and unknown produce BREAK_GLASS classification on the proof

conditions: All required fields present and non-null
proof_hash verifies against canonicalized proof content
head_sha does not match preo_head_sha or sco_head_sha

proof_storage_requirements.persistence: Merge proof must be stored in a durable, append-only registry bound to the repository
proof_storage_requirements.registry_location: proof registry (equivalent to proof_lineage_registry in runtime schema)
proof_storage_requirements.deduplication: proof_id and invocation_nonce must be unique per registry entry
proof_storage_requirements.audit_access: Proof registry must be readable for lineage reconstruction without requiring runtime mutation access
proof_storage_requirements.retention: Proof must be retained for the lifetime of the repository to support retrospective audit

failure_semantics.unauthorized_actor: BREAK_GLASS classification on proof — merge legitimacy remains NULL if actor bypassed required controls
